http.cookiejar/CookieJar/add_cookie_head.name: add_cookie_header
http.cookiejar/CookieJar/add_cookie_head.description: Add correct Cookie header to request. If policy allows (ie. the rfc2965 and hide_cookie2 attributes of the CookieJar’s CookiePolicy instance are true and false respectively), the Cookie2 header is also added when appropriate. The request object (usually a urllib.request.Request instance) must support the methods get_full_url(), has_header(), get_header(), header_items(), add_unredirected_header() and the attributes host, type, unverifiable and origin_req_host as documented by urllib.request. ...

http.cookiejar/DefaultCookiePolicy/allow.name: allowed_domains
http.cookiejar/DefaultCookiePolicy/allow.description: Return None, or the sequence of allowed domains (as a tuple).
